calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Trust Terms
Off Calendar May-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jaime Mannon appeared by zoom for Robert A. Blair (trustee).

Mr. Mannon stated that all parties consented. The Court noted that there are no objections. Petition to modify trust terms is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition To Modify Trust Terms
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Continued To May-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Jaime Mannon appearing via zoom for Robert Blair (trustee).

The Court stated the terms of the modification are in Ruth Annes favor, raised the issue of whether she has capacity to consent, whether there is someone with power of attorney who can consent if it finds that she lacks capacity, and questions whether a petition for appointment of a Guardian ad litem was filed. Mrs. Mannion stated that Ruth Annes attorney indicated that she has capacity to some extent, that her daughter Sheri has power of attorney and that she filed a declaration yesterday. The Petition to modify trust is continued to May 23, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for counsel to provide a courtesy copy of the declaration.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
